bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=qa-manager (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 47 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-07-09 · [fact_correction] 统一USD/CNH汇率口径

DONE

纠偏前日多口径差异，统一采信外汇高频监测数据 6.7634 (§0.3)

  • Outcome: research:USD/CNH → completed | dir=sessions/cf2cea74-2920-42ce-86b9-2e1fd9d6a0c0 | summary: 本报告的评级语言为外汇交易评级：买入 表示做多 USD/CNH，即做多美元、做空 CNH；卖出 表示做空 USD/CNH，即做空美元、做多 CNH[自测算]。本次给出 neutral（中性），因为 12 个月目标价 6.7622 低于现货 6.7855，且战术区间上沿 6.8796 相对下沿止损 6.6752 的风险回报仅 0.85x[S1][自测算：(6.8796 / 6.7855 - 1) / abs(6.6752 / 6.7855 - 1)]。 | → 1 forecast(s) on…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: USD/CNH

2026-07-09 · [research_task] Investigate Haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover

DONE · owner=factor-analyst · research discussion=Investigate Haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover (led by factor-analyst)

Examine the impact of haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover, as identified in Section 2.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Investigate Haircut/forced-sell口径 and broker ECL spillover" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 对既有研究记录全组合（44%价值杠铃+8%成长期权+25%利率债+16%黄金资源+7%现金）做终局压测：当科创50跌破1516–1550硬敲入带、130%线触发540.40亿级联强平、且NCD利差再走阔三者同时发生时，组合终局尾部损失≈-6.8%（级联中枢）至-8.4%（深度硬敲入，已对冲且满仓），约为常态99% VaR（-1.6%）的4–5倍，仍处-10%软性回撤上限内。关键发现：真正尾部约束是无对冲的44%价值杠铃（占损失63%），而非成长仓（期权封顶-2.6%且敲入带下方不加深）。NC…

  • Forecasts: 29 (0 positions); tickers: 601318.SH, SFISF, 601857.SH, 600028.SH, 600900.SH, 003816.SZ

2026-07-08 · [research_task] Investigate STAR50 ETF bid durability

DONE · owner=chief-strategist · research discussion=Investigate STAR50 ETF bid durability (led by chief-strategist)

Assess if STAR50 ETF bid is durable against semi mgn selling/snowball knock-in. Reference: Section 2.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Investigate STAR50 ETF bid durability" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 截至2026-07-03，完成了对避险组合再平衡路径与风险预算的最终合规性审计。最终确定的50/50物理红利与国债/现金引流权重（Option B）确保组合99%日度VaR在5B、10B及50B AUM规模下控制在-2.48%至-2.74%之间，符合-3.00%合规红线，避免了Option C中因关联度骤增引发的-2.87%至-2.92%的临界违规。研究轨迹逻辑闭环，数据流动无断裂，全案日期统一定量锚定在2026-07-03，予以PASS审核并结题。 | → 5 forecast(s) on STAR,CFFEX,CMR,SFISF,600…
